title: mailboxlayer Email Check Result
description: Successful response payload returned by GET /api/check after verifying a single email address.

email.description: The email address submitted for verification.

did_you_mean.description: Suggested email address if a likely typo was detected, otherwise an empty string.

user.description: The local part (user) of the submitted email address.

domain.description: The domain part of the submitted email address.

format_valid.description: Whether the email address has valid syntax.

mx_found.description: Whether MX records exist for the domain.

smtp_check.description: Whether the real-time SMTP verification succeeded.

catch_all.description: Whether the domain is configured as catch-all. Available on paid plans; may be null on Free.

role.description: Whether the address is a role-based address (e.g., support@, admin@).

disposable.description: Whether the domain belongs to a disposable email provider (e.g., mailinator.com).

free.description: Whether the domain belongs to a free email provider (e.g., gmail.com, yahoo.com).

score.description: Numeric deliverability quality score from 0.0 to 1.0.
